step_rationale: Amino acid in diagnostic biomarker ratios for ACS and myocardial injury detection.
mechanism: An amino acid employed in metabolite-ratio diagnostics for acute myocardial necrosis in STEMI.

references.title: GC-MS validation and analysis of targeted plasma metabolites related to carbonyl stress in type 2 diabetes mellitus patients with and without acute coronary syndrome.
